title: task
description: resources.py:168-188 - ProxyResource.render() forwards to any Proxy-Uri without validation. Docstring assumes mesh_ctx only routes to mesh nodes, but this is not enforced. Failure scenario: if mesh_ctx has UDP transport, attacker sends Proxy-Uri pointing to internal service (e.g., coap://192.168.1.1:5683/admin), enabling SSRF. Fix: validate target URI matches expected mesh address pattern before forwarding.
close_reason: Already fixed: ProxyResource.render() validates Proxy-Uri via _is_mesh_uri() at lines 216-218, rejecting IPv4, hostnames, and non-mesh IPv6. TestProxySsrfProtection (5 tests) confirms SSRF protection works.
